nasb.text: Remember the days of old, Consider the years of all generations. Ask your father, and he will inform you, Your elders, and they will tell you.

esv.text: Remember the days of old; consider the years of many generations; ask your father, and he will show you, your elders, and they will tell you.

cnv.text: 你要回想古時的日子， 思念歷代以來的年月； 問你的父親，他必告訴你； 問你的長者，他們必對你說。

ccb.text: “要回顾往昔，追溯历史； 问你们的父亲， 他们必回答你们； 问你们的长者， 他们必告诉你们。
